email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor IT Support (Level 1 & 2) bij Michael Page International. Uw oproep voor een hands-on, oplossingsgerichte IT-professional sluit naadloos aan bij mijn technische achtergrond en groeiende ervaring in IT-ondersteuning.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met Windows, Microsoft 365 en WordPress. Ik los technische problemen op, beheer gebruikersaccounts en voer systeemupdates uit. Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring met netwerkconfiguratie, back-ups en beveiligingsmaatregelen. Mijn B1 Nederlands stelt me in staat om vlot te communiceren met Nederlandstalige gebruikers, terwijl ik professioneel Engels spreek.

Ik ben leergierig, klantgericht en klaar om mijn technische vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw internationale klant. Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie en ervaring in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the IT Support (Level 1 & 2) position at Michael Page International. Your call for a hands-on, solution-oriented IT professional aligns perfectly with my technical background and growing experience in IT support.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I work daily with Windows, Microsoft 365, and WordPress. I troubleshoot technical issues, manage user accounts, and perform system updates. Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have experience with network configuration, backups, and security measures. My B1 Dutch allows me to communicate smoothly with Dutch-speaking users, while I speak professional English.

I am eager to learn, customer-focused, and ready to apply my technical skills for your international client. I look forward to discussing my motivation and experience in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

cv_highlights:
- Hands-on IT support experience: troubleshooting hardware/software, managing user accounts, and performing system updates in a production environment.
- Strong knowledge of Windows environment, Microsoft 365, and Active Directory from daily use at Episto and personal projects.
- Networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, LAN/WAN configuration and troubleshooting applied in website hosting and infrastructure.
- Customer-oriented communicator with B1 Dutch and professional English, able to support end-users effectively.
- Quick learner with a technical degree background and proven ability to adapt to new tools and systems.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior IT support professional with a technical foundation in web design, system administration, and user support. At Episto, I provide Level 1 & 2 support: troubleshooting hardware/software, managing user accounts, and maintaining Windows/Microsoft 365 environments. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied networking, backup, and security practices. Comfortable with ticketing systems, remote support, and documentation. Quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into infrastructure and system administration. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- User support: remote and on-site troubleshooting, incident logging, hardware/software installation, account management (Active Directory, Microsoft 365)
- System & infrastructure: Windows client & server, network configuration (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN), backup processes, security measures, system updates & patches
- Tools: Microsoft 365, Active Directory, ticketing systems, Google Workspace, WordPress, Elementor
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Provide Level 1 & 2 IT support: troubleshoot hardware, software, and network issues for remote users; manage user accounts and permissions in Microsoft 365 and Active Directory
- Install, configure, and maintain workstations, laptops, and peripherals; perform system updates and patches
- Log and track incidents through ticketing system; maintain documentation for common issues and resolutions
- Support backup processes and data protection strategies; contribute to IT projects and continuous improvement

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
